title: Quality Assurance Specialist
description:
Located in Meolo (Venice), Cipriani Industria is the manufacturing division of the Cipriani Group, where tradition, craftsmanship, and innovation come together to create products recognized worldwide for their exceptional quality.  

For more than 90 years, the Cipriani name has represented authenticity, excellence, and attention to detail. Every product is developed and manufactured according to the highest standards of quality, food safety, and regulatory compliance, preserving the heritage and reputation of one of Italy's most iconic hospitality and food brands.  

We are currently seeking a Quality Assurance Specialist based at our Meolo manufacturing facility, who will play a key role in ensuring product quality, food safety, regulatory compliance, and continuous improvement across the entire manufacturing process.  

  

**Requirements*** Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Food Science, Food Technology, Biology, Chemistry, Microbiology, or a related scientific discipline.
* Minimum of 5 years' experience in Quality Assurance, Food Safety, or Regulatory Affairs within the food manufacturing industry.
* Strong knowledge of BRCGS, HACCP, GMP, food legislation, FDA requirements, food labeling, traceability, and Food Safety Management Systems.
* Proven experience managing supplier qualification, audits, quality systems, CAPA, and technical documentation.
* Excellent analytical, organizational, and problem\-solving skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast\-paced manufacturing environment.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office (particularly Excel), ERP systems, and Quality Management Systems (QMS).
* Fluent in both Italian and English.
* Proactive, hands\-on approach with a strong commitment to quality, craftsmanship, and continuous improvement.

**Key Responsibilities*** Ensure the highest standards of product quality, food safety, and regulatory compliance throughout the manufacturing process.
* Monitor production activities to ensure compliance with company procedures, product specifications, hygiene standards, GMP, HACCP, BRCGS, and applicable regulatory requirements.
* Review and approve production records, product specifications, recipes, labels, and batch documentation.
* Prepare, maintain, and update technical documentation, product specifications, and labeling in collaboration with cross\-functional teams.
* Manage quality documentation for internally manufactured and externally sourced products, ensuring accuracy and regulatory compliance.
* Qualify, monitor, and periodically evaluate suppliers and contract manufacturers through audits, technical assessments, and performance reviews.
* Coordinate product sampling, laboratory analyses, shelf\-life studies, and product validation activities.
* Investigate non\-conformities, customer complaints, and food safety incidents, implementing effective Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA).
* Support product withdrawal and recall activities when required.
* Maintain and continuously improve the Food Safety \& Quality Management System, ensuring compliance with BRCGS certification standards.
* Monitor changes in food legislation and regulatory requirements related to products, packaging, labeling, ingredients, and export markets.
* Support sustainability and ESG initiatives by ensuring compliance with environmental regulations and supplier certification requirements.
* Participate in new product development and industrialization projects, providing quality and regulatory guidance.
* Plan and coordinate internal, supplier, customer, and certification audits.
* Act as the primary quality contact for suppliers, laboratories, certification bodies, customers, and regulatory authorities.
* Develop and deliver training programs on quality, food safety, hygiene, allergen management, and Good Manufacturing Practices.
* Monitor Quality KPIs and prepare reports to support business decisions and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Promote a culture of quality, food safety, operational excellence, sustainability, and continuous improvement throughout the organization.

**Benefits*** Competitive compensation package
* Continuous learning and professional development opportunities.
* Career growth within the Cipriani Group.
* Dynamic and international working environment.
* Opportunity to collaborate with Cipriani businesses and projects across Italy and internationally.




Birxxslehk

title: MECHANICAL ENGINEER (COOKING)
description:
Italy
Treviso, Italy


Technology
Mechanical
06/26/2026
**MECHANICAL ENGINEER (COOKING)**
=================================


**Job Responsibilities**
------------------------


Principle Accountabilities:


The Mechanical Engineer is wholly responsible for the design of components, sub\-assemblies, and new product concepts in line with the New Product Development (NPD) process. They will work closely with the Product Marketing, Industrial Design, Electronics, Testing, IP, Quality, and Regulatory Affairs departments. This responsibility spans from the initial product specification through to feasibility studies and robust design, ultimately concluding with the Start of Production (SOP).
  

Additionally, the engineer will participate in defining specific tests to approve components and systems for use. They will act to drive a "right\-first\-time" solution, carefully considering performance, obsolescence, cost, and other key program metrics.


Main Responsibilities:


* Collaborate with a multidisciplinary team to analyze and evaluate Trigger document specifications.
* Prepare preliminary product feasibility studies in collaboration with Industrial Design and the R\&D laboratory.
* Identify potential risks and issues that could negatively impact the development process.
* Create, manage, and maintain the Product Design Specification (PDS).
* Execute CAD design for parts and product layout definitions, while releasing and maintaining related technical documentation.
* Support the R\&D laboratory in the preparation and testing of prototypes.
* Preparing the necessary documentation and conducting the DFMEA. (Design Failure Mode and Effect Analysis)
* Prepare and maintain the preliminary technical Bill of Materials (BOM).
* Work with local R\&D and Purchasing teams to evaluate product costs/investments.
* Collaborate with moulding departments to analyze mould manufacturing processes.
* Support Local R\&D, Quality Control, and Production departments throughout the Engineering Build and Pre\-production series.
* Organize and actively participate in technical design reviews.
* Prepare technical documentation to highlight project status and future steps during technical reviews and NPD meetings.


**Job Profile**
---------------


Qualifications, Knowledges:
  

* BEng / BSc Qualified
* Experienced in the design of mechanical components \& systems
* Knowledge of 3D design tool (CATIA V5/SIEMENS NX)
* Knowledge of mass production product development
* Good knowledge of laboratory equipments and test results evaluation
* Good/Basic knowledge of the main cyber security and information protection principles

Skills,capabilities, Competencies:
  

* \+1 years of experience
* Be Creative and innovative, an Excellent problem solver
* Flexible \& adaptable with excellent time management
* Team player
* Self motivated
* Demonstrate accountability and credibility
* Willing to travel as required by project needs.
* Fluent in English, with the ability to prepare clear documentation, presentations, and technical reports in English.

What we offer:
  

* Dynamic Environment: Work in a fast\-paced and challenging environment.
* Impactful Work: Make a real difference in the quality of products that millions of people use every day.
* Growth Opportunities: Develop your career within a leading global company.
* Wellbeing initiatives (engagement survey, welfare program, company restaurant, health insurance)
* Work\-life balance (flexible work hours, remote work options)
* Partnerships and shopping programs (special price for company products, external partnerships \& discounts, smart lockers)
* Transparent Compensation: We offer a salary aligned with your expertise and dedication, fostering equity.

Our salary range for this position is 30\.000€\-45\.000€, and the applicable collective bargaining agreement (CCNL) is metalmeccanico.
  

The final offer and classification level may vary based on objective and gender\-neutral criteria, such as the candidate's skills, seniority, background and the qualifications for the job.
We are an Equal Opportunity Employer, we reject and condemn any form of discrimination including discrimination based on age, gender, sexual orientation, health, race, nationality, cultural background, political opinions and religious beliefs, and membership of associations and trade unions.

title: Regulatory Affairs Specialist
description:
Fresenius Kabi è un'azienda multinazionale leader nel settore dei farmaci e delle tecnologie per infusione, trasfusione e nutrizione clinica. Ogni giorno lavoriamo per prenderci cura della vita dei pazienti in tutto il mondo.
  
  

Per la nostra sede di Verona, siamo alla ricerca di un Regulatory Affairs Specialist da inserire all'interno del dipartimento Regulatory Affairs.
  
  

**Regulatory Affairs Specialist:**  

**La risorsa si occuperà di:**  

Predisporre la documentazione regolatoria e supportare la gestione delle pratiche di variazione, rinnovo e nuove registrazioni di medicinali autorizzati attraverso procedure nazionali ed europee (MRP/DCP e Centralizzate), nel rispetto della normativa vigente.
  
Coordinare le attività di post\-marketing, definendo le tempistiche di revisione e implementazione delle variazioni approvate e avviando i processi di aggiornamento dei testi autorizzati e delle relative pubblicazioni.
  
Gestire l'archiviazione della documentazione regolatoria secondo le procedure aziendali.
  
Collaborare con le principali funzioni aziendali, tra cui Quality Assurance, Farmacovigilanza, Produzione, Supply Chain e Marketing.
  
Aggiornare i database regolatori aziendali e contribuire all'implementazione di nuovi sistemi informatici e piattaforme a livello nazionale, europeo e corporate.
  
Revisionare i testi di etichettatura relativi agli Alimenti a Fini Medici Speciali (AFMS) e agli integratori alimentari, assicurandone la conformità alla normativa applicabile.
  
  

Requisiti
  
Laurea in discipline scientifiche (CTF, Farmacia, Chimica, Biotecnologie o affini).
  
Esperienza di almeno 4\-5 anni maturata in ambito Regulatory Affairs, preferibilmente nel settore farmaceutico.
  
Conoscenza della normativa nazionale ed europea applicabile a medicinali, dispositivi medici, alimenti a fini medici speciali e integratori alimentari.
  
Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese, sia scritta che parlata.
  
Familiarità con i principali strumenti informatici e database regolatori.
  
Ottime capacità organizzative, precisione e attenzione al dettaglio.
  
Predisposizione al lavoro in team e alla collaborazione interfunzionale.
  
  

Cosa offriamo
  
CCNL Chimico\-Farmaceutico.
  
  

**Fascia Retributiva:** 29\.000\-42\.000 lordi annui.
company_description: Fresenius Kabi is a global healthcare company that specializes in lifesaving medicines and technologies for infusion, transfusion and clinical nutrition.

title: Legal Specialist I Corporate Governance & Regulatory Affairs
Internship Financial Risk | Verona
description:
**Internship Financial Risk \| Verona**  


*The chance to build a better future is right in front of you*  


***Do Work That Matters*** **\- Your role and responsibilities**Do you want to pursue a profession that is truly meaningful and impactful? At KPMG, you will have the opportunity to help clients, the company and colleagues address and solve the most current and complex challenges. **KPMG Advisory** offers consulting services to companies to assist them in business model transformation, process improvement and digitisation, risk analysis and management, and support in extraordinary finance transactions. When you join the Financial Risk team in Verona*,* you are going to work on projects in the field of Risk Management, with a focus both on regulatory and organizational aspects of competence and on the development and validation of modeling for top\-tier clients in the Financial Services sector.  

  

  

Specifically, you will be tasked with:  


* Credit and Market Risk;
* Operational Risk;
* Liquidity and Interest Rate Risk;
* Insurance Risk;
* Regulatory and ESG Risk

  


***Come As*** ***You Are \- Your skills and characteristics***This is the perfect opportunity for you if:


* have a specialist degree (graduate or nearing completion) in finance or quantitative field (statistics, mathematics);
* have excellent knowledge of English, preferably with study and/or work experience abroad;
* have an excellent knowledge of Microsoft Office;
* knowledge of programming software and languages (Python, SAS, R, Matlab and Stata).

  


***Your Future With Us \- What you’ll find at KPMG***


* An **inclusive** and equitable **work environment** that respects, encourages and values **diversity.**
* A challenging and dynamic environment that encourages **creativity** and **teamwork.**
* **Hybrid** work arrangements to promote a healthy work\-life balance.
* Advanced **training** and development programmes to stay current.
* **International** **mindset** and **innovative projects.**
* Initiatives focused on **mental and physical well\-being.**

  

  

***Together for Better – Our values and commitment***



Leadership, teamwork, respect every individual, continuous learning, transparency, commitment to the community and integrity. These are the **KPMG** **values** that create an environment that encourages the sharing of ideas and knowledge, so our professionals can **achieve their full potential**.



As a result of our commitment to fostering an **inclusive work** environment, our Network complies with the standards of the **ISO 30415** requirements, on the Diversity and Inclusion Management System, and **UNI PdR 125**, relating to gender equality”. Within our **Impact Plan** \- Our Impact Plan (kpmg.com) \- you will find summarised all the concrete actions we are taking on environmental, social and governance (ESG) issues.

  


**Join us!**


*Your data will be processed in full compliance with the provisions of Regulation (EU) no. 679/2016 (General Data Protection Regulation \- “GDPR”), as amended. For more information, please see KPMG’s privacy policy**.*


*KPMG Advisory S.p.A. is an equal opportunity employer.*
company_description: At KPMG, you'll be able to tap into your skills, expertise and passion to help organizations find sustainable solutions to the world's most pressing issues.

title: R&D Product Development Engineer
description:
**Date:** Jul 10, 2026


**Location:** Badia Polesine (RO), IT, 45021


**Company:** Dentsply Sirona, Inc


**Requistion ID**: 83764  


  

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with over a century of innovation and service to the dental industry and patients worldwide. Dentsply Sirona develops, manufactures, and markets a comprehensive solutions offering including dental and oral health products as well as other consumable medical devices under a strong portfolio of world class brands.  



Dentsply Sirona’s products provide innovative, high\-quality, and effective solutions to advance patient care and deliver better and safer dental care. Dentsply Sirona’s headquarter is located in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company’s shares are listed in the United States on NASDAQ under the symbol XRAY. Visit www.dentsplysirona.com for more information about Dentsply Sirona and its products.  



  

For our manufacturing site in Badia Polesine (RO), we are looking for a:  


**R\&D Product Development Engineer**  



As part of the **Research \& Development** team, you will play a key role in the development of new silicone formulations for medical devices intended for international markets. You will be involved in laboratory activities, performance testing, and stability studies, while also contributing to the preparation of the technical and regulatory documentation required for FDA registration processes and the development of Private Label products. Working closely with cross\-functional teams, you will support innovation and contribute to the success of our product development projects.  


**Responsibilities**
* Carry out product and material development activities, ensuring the continuous improvement of existing products while meeting commercial launch timelines.
* Coordinate and manage product development activities, from the concept phase through to production support during the scale\-up process from laboratory to manufacturing.
* Participate in the creation and maintenance of bills of materials (BOMs), work instructions, and production specifications.
* Collaborate with suppliers in the qualification of new raw materials and components.
* Ensure technical compliance, product quality, and adherence to regulatory and market requirements.
* Provide the R\&D Documentation Specialist with data and reports required for the preparation of product technical documentation.
* Identify root causes of non\-conformities and propose appropriate corrective actions.

  


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in a scientific discipline such as Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Chemistry and Technology (CTF), or a related field.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making skills.
* Results\-oriented mindset and ability to work effectively toward objectives.
* Agility and intellectual curiosity, with a genuine interest in change, innovation, and continuous learning.
* Strong teamwork and collaboration skills.
* Good command of written and spoken English.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office and general computer applications.
* Alignment with the company values of **Respect** (for company standards, vision, colleagues, customers, processes, and work instructions), **Accountability**, **Collaboration**, **Reliability**, and **Agility** (continuous improvement).

  

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:** Dentsply Sirona is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will be considered without unlawful discrimination or regard for race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, sexual or gender identity, national or ethnic origin, age, marital status, disability, genetic factors, military and veteran status, or any other characteristics protected by applicable local law.
**Eligibility:** All successful applicants must be eligible to work in the country the position is based.
**Assistance:** If you need assistance with completing the online application due to a disability, please send an accommodation request to accommodationrequest@dentsplysirona.com.
**Agencies:** Please note that Dentsply Sirona does not accept or respond to unsolicited requests or applications submitted by Recruitment Agencies/ Search Firms.
**Notice on Fraudulent Job Offers:** Unfortunately, we are aware of third parties that pretend to represent our company offering unauthorized employment opportunities. If you think a fraudulent source is offering you a job, please have a look at the following information: careers.dentsplysirona.com.
company_description: Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies.

title: Product Compliance & Certification Specialist
description:
Xylem is a Fortune 500 global water solutions company dedicated to advancing sustainable impact and empowering the people who make water work every day. As a leading water technology company with 23,000 employees operating in over 150 countries, Xylem is at the forefront of addressing the world's most critical water challenges. We invite passionate individuals to join our team, dedicated to exceeding customer expectations through innovative and sustainable solutions.

**THE ROLE**  

The Product Compliance \& Certification Specialist is responsible for ensuring product compliance with applicable safety, regulatory, and certification requirements across global markets. The role partners with Product Management, Engineering, Manufacturing, Sourcing, customers, and certification bodies to support product development, market access, and regulatory compliance throughout the product lifecycle.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Monitor global regulations, standards, and market requirements for electromechanical products.
* Support Product Management and Engineering in defining and maintaining compliant product specifications.
* Coordinate testing, certifications, product approvals, and registrations with external laboratories and certification agencies.
* Assess compliance impacts for ETO projects and provide guidance on product safety requirements.
* Maintain certification, standards, and regulatory databases.
* Provide compliance expertise, technical documentation, and training to internal stakeholders.
* Monitor regulatory changes and support continuous improvement initiatives.

**Qualifications**

* Degree or Diploma in Electrical Engineering, Environmental Engineering, or equivalent.
* 3–5 years of experience in product compliance, certification, product safety, or related technical fields.
* Ability to interpret technical standards and test reports.

**Key Competencies**

* Strong collaboration and communication skills.
* Proactive, detail\-oriented, and results\-driven mindset.
* Ability to work effectively in cross\-functional and international environments.
* Continuous improvement and innovation mindset.

**CONTRACT:** Permanent, full time \- Hybrid

**LOCATION:** Montecchio Maggiore (VI)

**BENEFIT:** company bonus and company canteen


Join the global Xylem team to be a part of innovative technology solutions transforming water usage, conservation, and re\-use. Our products impact public utilities, industrial sectors, residential areas, and commercial buildings, with a commitment to providing smart metering, network technologies, and advanced analytics for water, electric, and gas utilities. Partner with us in creating a world where water challenges are met with ingenuity and dedication; where we recognize the power of inclusion and belonging in driving innovation and allowing us to compete more effectively around the world.

title: DOL TAP Facilitator - (Part-time) - Vicenza, Italy
description:
Available in 3 locations


**DOL TAP Facilitator \- (Part\-time) \- Vicenza, Italy**
---------------------------------------------------------


Available in 3 locations
Vicenza, IT, 36100
 US Army Garrison Vicenza, IT
 Vicenza, IT
Vicenza, IT, 36100
Category: Counseling/Support/Outreach
Job ID: 18295
widget: Part\-Time
None
No \- Teleworking not available for this position
$39520\-$75339\.58
  
### **Position Description \& Qualifications**

  

  

**JOIN OUR TEAM** to assist and prepare \~200,000 service members who separate annually from the United States Military begin a new life chapter as a civilian. The Department of Labor (DOL) Veterans’ Employment and Training Service (VETS) program requires contractor services to support these transitioning Servicemembers through its highly successful Transition Assistance Program (TAP) that is offered world\-wide to conduct job assistance workshops, employment counseling, as well as connection to approved government and non\-government partners. Our team ensures servicemembers and their families have the necessary career tools and information to seamlessly transition into the civilian workforce.


The DOL VETS TAP program is in need of a skilled and compassionate **Facilitator** who has prior experience teaching and/or instructing military personnel transitioning to civilian professional and vocational occupations.


In this role, you will:


* Teach and/or instruct military personnel transitioning to civilian professional and vocational occupations
* Guide transitioning military service members in identifying goals along with recognizing any employment or education gaps
* Provide transitioning service members (Active, Reserve, National Guard), family members, and veterans a comprehensive understanding of preparing for civilian employment, job searching, job application processes, networking, technical training opportunities and credentialing
* Assist in preparing for civilian employment and participation in technical programs and schools
* Conduct small and large group instruction on the job search process
* Deliver standardized curriculum via in\-person or virtual classrooms
* Complete administrative tasks in a timely manner to include travel expense and classroom reports

Additional information:


* Facilitator will be assigned to a location within a hub that has designated satellite locations
* Any facilitation assignment that is greater than 50 miles from facilitator’s assigned location, then, travel will be reimbursed
* 80 hours of paid comprehensive initial training is provided and expected to be completed within the first month of employment
* Part\-time facilitators’ schedules can vary weekly. Generally, facilitators work 2 – 3 days consecutively

To be successful in this role, you will have:


* Requires Bachelor’s degree in a related field; or
	+ An Associate’s Degree in a related field and four (4\) years of recent specialized experience working as a Workforce Solutions or HR Specialist; or
	+ A major certification and six (6\) years of recent specialized experience; or
	+ A High School Diploma and eight (8\) years of recent specialized experience
* Experience which demonstrates understanding of private and public sector employment processes
* Must be knowledgeable of the workplace, jobs, and requirement for entry into those jobs
* Must demonstrate the ability to provide standardized training to groups with up to 50 participants
* Familiar with MS Windows and Office
* Ability to effectively communicate with Military clients and Government representatives
* Comfortability instructing and speaking in front of a group, be observant of others, possess the ability to professionally engage with a diverse audience
* Ability to work extended hours, including weekdays, weekends, and some holidays if required
* Must have excellent time management skills, able to work independently and follow directions
* Must have ability to respond to emergent facilitation assignments
* Ability to meet country specific employment requirements such as ECOPS
* The ability to travel up to 10%

If you are interested in supporting and working with our military and a passionate Serco team\- then submit your application now for immediate consideration. It only takes a few minutes and could change your career!


Military Veterans and Spouses encouraged to apply.

  

  

### **Company Overview**

  

  

Serco Inc. (Serco) is the Americas division of Serco Group, plc. In North America, Serco’s 9,000\+ employees strive to make an impact every day across 100\+ sites in the areas of Defense, Citizen Services, and Transportation. We help our clients deliver vital services more efficiently while increasing the satisfaction of their end customers. Serco serves every branch of the U.S. military, numerous U.S. Federal civilian agencies, the Intelligence Community, the Canadian government, state, provincial and local governments, and commercial clients. While your place may look a little different depending on your role, we know you will find yours here. Wherever you work and whatever you do, we invite you to discover your place in our world. Serco is a place you can count on and where you can make an impact because every contribution matters.
  

  

To review Serco benefits please visit: https://careers.serco\-na.com/us/en/what\-we\-offer. If you require an accommodation with the application process please email: careers@serco\-na.com or call the HR Service Desk at 800\-628\-6458, option 1\. Please note, due to EEOC/OFCCP compliance, Serco is unable to accept resumes by email.
  

  

Candidates may be asked to present proof of identify during the selection process. If requested, this will require presentation of a government\-issued I.D. (with photo) with name and address that match the information entered on the application. Serco will not take possession of or retain/store the information provided as proof of identity. For more information on how Serco uses your information, please see our Applicant Privacy Policy and Notice.
  

  

Serco does not accept unsolicited resumes through or from search firms or staffing agencies without being a contracted approved vendor. All unsolicited resumes will be considered the property of Serco and will not be obligated to pay a placement or contract fee. If you are interested in becoming an approved vendor at Serco, please email Agencies@serco\-na.com.
  

  

Serco is an equal opportunity employer. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, and other legally protected characteristics.

  

  

### **Pay Transparency**

  

  

Our Total Rewards package includes competitive pay, performance\-based incentives, and benefits that promote well\-being and work\-life balance—so you can thrive both professionally and personally. Eligible employees also gain access to a wide range of benefits from comprehensive health coverage and health savings accounts to retirement plans, life and disability insurance, and time\-off programs that support work\-life balance. Program availability may vary based on factors such as contract type, location, hire date, and applicable collective bargaining agreements.
  

  

Salary range: The range for this position can be found at the top of this posting. This range is provided as a general guideline and represents a good faith estimate across all experience levels. Actual base salary will be determined by a variety of factors, including but not limited to, the scope of the role, relevant experience, job\-related knowledge, education and training, key skills, and geographic market considerations. For roles available in multiple states, the range may vary to reflect differences in local labor markets. In addition to base salary, eligible positions may include other forms of compensation such as annual bonuses or long\-term incentive opportunities. Benefits – Comprehensible benefits for full\-time employees (part\-time employees receive a limited package tailored to their role):  

  

  



* Medical, dental, and vision insurance
* Robust vacation and sick leave benefits, and flexible work arrangements where permitted by role or contract
* 401(k) plan that includes employer matching funds
* Tuition reimbursement program
* Life insurance and disability coverage
* Optional coverages that can be purchased, including pet insurance, home and auto insurance, additional life and accident insurance, critical illness insurance, group legal, ID theft protection
* Birth, adoption, parental leave benefits
* Employee Assistance Plan
  

  

  

To review all Serco benefits please visit: https://careers.serco\-na.com/us/en/about\-us.
  

  

Serco complies with all applicable state and local leave laws, including providing time off under the Colorado Healthy Families and Workplaces Act for eligible Colorado residents, in alignment with our policies and benefit plans. The application window for this position is for no more than 60 days. We encourage candidates to apply promptly after the posting date, as the position may close earlier if filled or if the application volume exceeds expectations. Please submit applications exclusively through Serco’s external (or internal) career site. If an applicant has any concerns with job posting compliance, please send an email to: careers@serco\-na.com.

title: Responsible Person
description:
Are you ready to harness your passion for finance in the dynamic role of Responsible Person? Discover below the challenges and rewards that come with this role at H.Essers.

**YOUR CHALLENGES**

As Responsible Person, you are responsible for the financial follow\-up of a portfolio of companies in Belgium and abroad.


What does this mean specifically:

* Ensure compliance with:
	+ GDP regulations for human and veterinary medicinal products
	+ Legislative Decree 219/2006
	+ EU GDP Guidelines (2013/C 343/01\)
	+ Ministerial Decree 6 July 1999
	+ Legislative Decree 218/2023
	+ EU Regulation 2021/1248
* Support Responsible Person (RP) obligations for wholesale distribution activities.
* Participate in audits, inspections and regulatory interactions.

**Quality Management**

* Investigate quality issues and regulatory questions.
* Perform risk assessments and Quality Risk Management activities.
* Analyze data and propose corrective and preventive actions.
* Prepare and maintain quality documentation.

**Reporting \& Management Support**

* Prepare reports, analyses and recommendations.
* Present findings to management.
* Contribute to Management Reviews and quality performance monitoring.

**Project Management**

* Support quality and compliance projects.
* Define project scope and timelines.
* Participate in project meetings and implementation activities.

**Training \& Continuous Improvement**

* Deliver GDP/GxP training to employees.
* Keep up to date with regulatory developments.
* Support continuous improvement initiatives.
* Review and improve quality processes and procedures.

**Stakeholder Management**

* Act as the main quality reference point for internal departments.
* Interface with customers, suppliers and regulatory authorities (e.g. Ministry of Health, AIFA).
* Support business operations with quality and regulatory advice.

**YOUR TALENTS**

* Analytical thinking
* Problem\-solving mindset
* Collaboration and teamwork
* Advisory and influencing skills
* Continuous learning attitude
* Strong communication skills

**Education Requirements**


Mandatory degree in:

* Pharmacy
* Pharmaceutical Chemistry and Technology (CTF)
* Chemistry
* Industrial Chemistry

**Additionally:**

* Eligible for registration with the relevant professional body.
* Eligibility and willingness to become a Qualified Person (QP) is considered an advantage.

**YOUR REWARD**

* Competitive salary package with a target RAL starting from approximately €40,000\.
* Meal vouchers for each working day through the Edenred platform.
* Employment conditions in line with the CCNL Logistics, Transport and Freight Forwarding Sector.
* Company smartphone and laptop provided to support your daily activities.

**7500 REASONS TO CHOOSE H.ESSERS**

* Family values: have provided a strong foundation of trust and commitment for both employees and customers since 1928
* Job security: in a rapidly changing world
* Ambitious team: with 7500 dedicated colleagues, we strive for excellence and have an abundance of ambition and opportunity
* Innovation: in our processes and services, enabling us to serve our customers ever more efficiently and sustainably
* Sustainable international growth: recognizing our social, economic, and environmental responsibilities as an organization to have a positive impact on society as a whole
* Diversity and inclusion: are crucial to a healthy and productive work environment and are actively embraced within H.Essers

**These are just a few reasons why H.Essers is an attractive choice, we are eager to discover your reason(s).**
company_description: H.Essers is a place where our 7,500 ambitious colleagues dare to be entrepreneurial, grab opportunities and make a difference every day. Because sustainable growth is something we do together.

title: Inventory Analyst & Supply Planner
description:
**Challenge Yourself and Impact the Future!**

  

MacDermid Enthone Industrial Solutions operates as a business of Element Solutions Inc (NYSE: ESI). Element Solutions Inc is a leading specialty chemicals company whose businesses supply a broad range of solutions that enhance the products people use every day.

  

MacDermid Enthone Industrial Solutions is a global supplier of industrial metal and plastic finishing chemistries. We primarily design and manufacture chemical systems that protect and decorate surfaces. Our high\-performance functional coatings improve resistance to wear and tear, such as hard chrome plating of shock absorbers for cars, or provide corrosion resistance for appliance parts. Our decorative performance coatings apply finishes for parts in various end markets such as automotive interiors or jewelry surfaces. As part of our broader sustainable solutions platform, we also provide both chemistry and equipment for turnkey wastewater treatment, and recycle and reuse solutions. Our industrial customer base is highly diverse and includes customers in the following end markets: appliances and electronics; automotive parts; industrial parts; plumbing goods; construction equipment; and transportation equipment.

  

We strive to embody the five 'Elements of our Culture'\- our '5C's'; Challenge, Commit, Collaborate, Choose, and Care. These core values are the foundation of our organization which our employees embrace in their interactions with customers, colleagues and other stakeholders, to drive financial performance and create a rewarding work environment.

  

**Who are we looking for?**
---------------------------


We are currently looking for an inventory analyst and supply chain planner. The person will be responsible for orchestrating and optimizing the flow of finished goods across the EMEA region. This role ensures efficient distribution from manufacturing sites or central warehouses to local markets, maintaining high service levels while controlling costs and managing capacity constraints.

  

The position acts as a key link between ICO team, SIOP team and logistics ensuring seamless execution of regional distribution strategies. This is a regional role covering multiple EMEA countries. The working model is hybrid with occasional travel to warehouses, plants, or logistics hubs.

  

Reporting Line: EMEA Intercompany Manager.

  

This position is located in Villorba (TV), Italy.


**What will you be doing?**
---------------------------


**Key Responsibilities**


Distribution, Planning \& Execution
Coordinate the movement of goods across EMEA (plants* + distribution centers)
	+ Develop and maintain distribution plans aligned with demand and supply plans
	+ Ensure timely and efficient order fulfillment across multiple countries
* Inventory Management
	+ Master data governance
	+ Aging review and re\-allocation of slow moving
	+ Stock health
* Logistics \& Network Coordination
	+ Optimize transport routes, shipment consolidation, and distribution flows
	+ Support warehouse allocation and stock positioning decisions across the network
	+ Capacity \& Service Level Management
	+ Proactively manage risks impacting service levels and propose mitigation actions
	+ Balance inventory availability with transportation efficiency and cost targets
	+ Monitor and improve OTD performance
**Data Analysis \& Reporting**


* Ensure data accuracy in ERP and planning systems
* Prepare regular reports and dashboards for stakeholders
* Track and analyze key distribution KPIs: OTD, POP
* Logistics costs (freigh\-in, freight\-out, warehousing)
* Leadtimes
  

**Continuous Improvement**


* Identify opportunities to improve transportation efficiency and reduce costs
* Contribute to logistics network optimization and redesign initiatives
* Drive process standardization across multiple countries and sites
* Support digital tools implementation (SAP, PowerBI, IBP)
**Who are You?**
----------------


* Bachelor’s degree in supply chain, logistics, business, engineering, or related field.
* 3–6 years of experience in logistics, distribution, or supply chain coordination.
* Experience in a regional (EMEA) or multi\-country environment is highly preferred.
* Familiarity with ERP systems (SAP, JDE).
* Experience with planning tools is an advantage.
* Strong Excel skills; Power BI is a plus.
* Solid understanding of logistics flows, incoterms, and cross\-border operations.
  

We understand that not all candidates may meet the requirements listed above. If you believe you have the knowledge and experience necessary to excel in this role, we encourage you to apply.


**What competencies will you need?**
------------------------------------


* Team player as the candidate will work closely with other departments like Demand Planning (forecast alignment), Supply Planning / Production (availability) and S\&OP.
* Strong coordination and stakeholder management skills.
* Analytical mindset with problem\-solving ability.
* Ability to work under pressure and manage operational complexity.
* Excellent communication and organizational skills.
* Fluent in English; additional European languages are an advantage.
**We are Offering...**
----------------------


You will be employed with the National Contract of Chemists (CCNL Chimico) with the possibility to subscribe to the related Health and Pension funds (FASCHIM and FONCHIM).


As part of our team here you will receive a competitive base salary, you will participate in a generous performance\-related bonus scheme, as well as a yearly welfare plan. For this role, we are offering a salary starting from €39,531 per annum.


You will receive a company laptop computer, and you will be given a meal voucher of 9 €/worked day.


Working time: 37\.45 hours/week.


At Element Solutions Inc, you will be part a highly collaborative culture that promotes continuous improvement through cross\-functional partnerships to achieve our mission. We do this through a strong and unified culture and transparent management which has empowered us to create high performing global teams that achieve superior solutions for our customers. \#LI\-IF1


**Equal Opportunity Employer**

  

All qualified applications will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, pregnancy, genetic information, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any other protected category applicable under federal, state and local laws.

title: Beauty Advisor - Thiene (VI)
description:
**Costruisci il tuo futuro con noi**


Il Gruppo Douglas, con oltre 2000 profumerie in 19 paesi europei, è il retailer di riferimento nel mondo della profumeria selettiva. Alla base della crescita e della continua espansione del gruppo ci sono 20\.000 collaboratori qualificati e motivati che amano prendersi cura dei clienti, un assortimento con più di 160\.000 prodotti di bellezza e lifestyle ed un e\-commerce all'avanguardia.


Douglas ispira a vivere la propria **unicità**: la nostra mission è incoraggiare i nostri clienti ad **amarsi** e a celebrare la loro **bellezza** anche attraverso le proprie azioni nel mondo.


Le persone sono il nostro core, ci differenziano e sono l’anima di Douglas.


**Uniti**, rappresentiamo una società **inclusiva**, **diversificata** e **paritaria**. Lavoriamo insieme per un mondo in cui tutti si sentono **visti**, **ascoltati** e **valorizzati**.

Perché in Douglas ognuno di noi è unico: celebriamo **l'individualità**!


Per il nostro punto vendita di**Thiene**, siamo alla ricerca di un/a **Beauty Avdisor**

**OVERVIEW DEL TUO RUOLO**

* Accogliere, assistere e supportare la clientela durante la fase di acquisto;
* Fornire consulenze personalizzate al fine di garantire il pieno soddisfacimento delle esigenze della clientela;
* Collaborare attivamente con il team al fine di raggiungere gli obiettivi qualitativi e quantitativi prestabiliti dall’Azienda;
* Collaborare con il team per garantire l’allestimento dello store secondo le linee guida definite dai diversi Dipartimenti preposti (Marketing, Visual Merchandising...);
* Gestire e assicurare un’efficiente organizzazione del magazzino.

**IL TUO VALORE AGGIUNTO**


* Hai una precedente esperienza di vendita nel settore beauty e hai orientamento commerciale;
* Hai una conoscenza approfondita delle tecniche di make\-up;
* Sei disponibile a lavorare su turni, anche sabato o domenica;
* Ti piace lavorare in un contesto dinamico e hai un forte spirito di iniziativa, curiosità e self motivation;
* Hai ottime capacità relazionali, predisposizione al problem solving e al lavoro in team.

**PERCHÉ UNIRTI A NOI?**


* Perché aiutiamo i nostri clienti a vivere la loro bellezza in modo divertente e innovativo
* Perché offriamo un percorso formativo completo (on the job, digital e in class) per accompagnare la tua crescita professionale
* Perché vivrai in un ambiente stimolante, dinamico, anticipatore dei trend
* Perché hai la possibilità di entrare in un’Azienda multinazionale leader in Europa

**Pacchetto retributivo:**


* RAL compresa tra € 23\.000,00 e 25\.000,00 ccnl Distribuzione Moderna Organizzata, art. 97 e seguenti.


La retribuzione sarà riproporzionata sulla base dell'orario contrattuale.


* Sistema welfare


* Scontistica per i dipendenti e iniziative di well\-being


**È quello che stai cercando?**


Invia la tua candidatura, non vediamo l’ora di conoscerti!

title: IT Support Specialist
description:
Cerchiamo una figura che, partendo dalle attività operative di supporto agli utenti, possa evolvere progressivamente verso un ruolo più ampio di coordinamento del Digital Workplace, gestione dei fornitori tecnologici e supporto ai progetti di innovazione digitale dello Studio.

Nei primi mesi la risorsa sarà coinvolta nelle attività di:

* Supporto agli utenti nelle problematiche quotidiane.
* Gestione delle richieste IT e attività di primo livello.
* Onboarding e offboarding del personale.
* Configurazione e supporto di strumenti Microsoft 365\.
* Gestione dell'inventario hardware e software.
* Coordinamento e monitoraggio degli interventi dei fornitori IT.
* Documentazione delle procedure e delle attività svolte.
* Supporto all'adozione di nuovi strumenti e soluzioni digitali.

Con l'esperienza, la risorsa potrà assumere maggiori responsabilità nell'ambito:

* Digital Workplace.
* User Adoption e formazione interna.
* Coordinamento tecnologico.
* Ottimizzazione dei processi digitali.
* Iniziative legate all'AI e a Microsoft Copilot

La persona selezionata lavorerà principalmente con:

* Microsoft 365
* Outlook
* Teams
* SharePoint
* OneDrive
* Microsoft Copilot
* M\-Files
* Profis
* Studio4
* Soluzioni di gestione accessi e cybersecurity di base (MFA, gestione identità, ecc.)

Cerchiamo una persona che possieda:

* Buona preparazione informatica di base.
* Interesse per le tecnologie Microsoft e il Digital Workplace.
* Forte orientamento al servizio e supporto agli utenti.
* Ottime capacità comunicative e relazionali.
* Attitudine all'organizzazione e alla documentazione.
* Curiosità, spirito di iniziativa e desiderio di apprendere.
* Capacità di lavorare in team e di relazionarsi con fornitori esterni.

Costituiscono titolo preferenziale

* Esperienza, anche breve, in attività di supporto IT.
* Conoscenza di Microsoft 365, Teams, SharePoint e OneDrive.
* Interesse verso AI, automazione e strumenti collaborativi.
* Esperienze di stage, tirocinio o apprendistato in ambito IT

Cosa offriamo

* Inserimento stabile in un ambiente professionale dinamico e in crescita.
* Percorso strutturato di affiancamento e formazione.
* Possibilità di lavorare a stretto contatto con partner e fornitori tecnologici qualificati.
* Coinvolgimento diretto nei progetti di trasformazione digitale dello Studio.
* Esposizione a tecnologie innovative, tra cui Microsoft Copilot e strumenti di Intelligenza Artificiale.
* Opportunità di crescita verso ruoli di coordinamento IT e Digital Workplace.
* Possibilità di formazione continua e certificazioni professionali.
* Revisione strutturata del percorso professionale dopo i primi 12 mesi.

Il candidato ideale

Non stiamo cercando necessariamente la persona con il maggior numero di competenze tecniche, ma qualcuno che sappia coniugare affidabilità, capacità di apprendimento, orientamento al servizio e interesse per l'innovazione digitale, con l'obiettivo di diventare nel tempo un punto di riferimento operativo e tecnologico per lo Studio.

Retribuzione: a partire da €25\.000,00 all'anno

Benefit:

* Supporto allo sviluppo professionale

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: Dottore Commercialista
description:
EVO è una realtà professionale dinamica e in continua crescita, con oltre 10 anni di esperienza nella consulenza alle imprese. Supportiamo i nostri clienti nel raggiungimento dei loro obiettivi offrendo servizi qualificati in ambito fiscale, legale, societario e consulenziale.

Chi cerchiamo:

Per l’ampliamento del team consulenziale, siamo alla ricerca di un Dottore Commercialista con comprovata esperienza (almeno 3 anni) e significativa autonomia operativa.

Requisiti:

* Esperienza e piena autonomia nelle seguenti attività:
* Solida conoscenza della normativa tributaria
* Calcolo delle imposte dirette e indirette per società di capitali
* Redazione di bilanci civilistici ordinari
* Consulenza fiscale e societaria continuativa alle imprese, con gestione autonoma di un portafoglio clienti
* Capacità di impostare e gestire operazioni straordinarie societarie
* Attitudine al problem solving e al lavoro in team

Cosa offriamo:

* Contratto di collaborazione pluriennale con crescita definita nel tempo
* Ambiente di lavoro giovane, stimolante e collaborativo
* Inserimento in un contesto professionale dinamico e in espansione
* Percorsi di formazione continua e aggiornamento professionale

Dettagli posizione:

* Sede di lavoro: Padova (zona Camin)

Modalità di candidatura

Inviare la propria candidatura all’indirizzo email: segreteria@evoadvisors.it indicando nell’oggetto “Candidatura Dottore Commercialista”.

Il trattamento dei dati personali avverrà nel rispetto del Regolamento UE 2016/679 (GDPR).

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: Tecnico Manutentore Estintore-Idranti-Porte Antincendio
description:
**Fulgard**, azienda leader italiana che offre servizi integrati incentrati sulla sicurezza, la salute ed il benessere della forza lavoro dei propri clienti, cerca per Sicura spa:

**Manutentore Estintori, Idranti e Serramenti**

Figura professionale autonoma in grado di garantire l'efficienza e la conformità normativa dei dispositivi presso i nostri clienti, agendo come referente tecnico sul campo e assicurando un servizio di alta qualità.

**Responsabilità Principali:**

* Eseguire la manutenzione programmata (sorveglianza, controllo, revisione e collaudo) di estintori portatili e carrellati di ogni tipo (polvere, CO₂, schiuma, idrici).
* Effettuare interventi di controllo e manutenzione su reti idranti, inclusi idranti a muro (NASPI), idranti soprasuolo/sottosuolo e attacchi per motopompe.
* Eseguire la verifica periodica e la manutenzione di porte e portoni tagliafuoco (REI), garantendone la corretta funzionalità e chiusura.
* Compilare in modo accurato i registri delle attrezzature antincendio e i rapporti di intervento digitali.
* Gestire in autonomia le attività di ricarica e collaudo degli estintori presso le sedi o con i nostri mezzi attrezzati.
* Fornire consulenza di base al cliente sullo stato dei presidi e sulla corretta gestione degli stessi.
* Assicurare il pieno rispetto delle normative tecniche di settore durante ogni intervento.

**Competenze** 

* Autonomia e Organizzazione: Eccellente capacità di pianificare e gestire in autonomia il proprio giro di interventi, rispettando scadenze e priorità.
* Precisione e Manualità: Ottima manualità nell'utilizzo di attrezzature specifiche per la manutenzione di estintori, idranti e nella regolazione di chiusure tagliafuoco.
* Diagnostica Meccanica: Abilità nell'individuare e risolvere problematiche funzionali su presidi meccanici e idraulici.
* Gestione del Cliente: Ottime doti relazionali per interfacciarsi con i clienti in modo professionale, chiaro e costruttivo.
* Uso di Strumenti Digitali: Dimestichezza nell'utilizzo di tablet e software gestionali per la compilazione della reportistica.

**Conoscenze** 

Normative di Settore**:** Conoscenza approfondita e applicata delle normative di riferimento per la manutenzione dei presidi antincendio:

* **UNI 9994\-1:** Manutenzione e controllo degli estintori d'incendio.
* **UNI EN 671\-3:** Manutenzione di naspi antincendio e idranti a muro.
* **UNI 10779:** Progettazione, installazione ed esercizio delle reti di idranti.
* **UNI 11473:** Porte e finestre apribili resistenti al fuoco e/o per il controllo della dispersione di fumo (manutenzione).
* Tipologie di Presidi: Conoscenza tecnica delle diverse tipologie di estintori (agenti estinguenti, modalità d'uso), componenti delle reti idranti (lance, tubazioni, valvole) e meccanismi di funzionamento delle porte REI (chiudiporta, guarnizioni, maniglioni antipanico).

**Esperienza**

* Anzianità nel Ruolo: Almeno 5\-7 anni di esperienza diretta come tecnico manutentore specializzato in estintori, idranti e porte tagliafuoco.
* Contesti Operativi: Aver operato su impianti e presidi in contesti diversificati (aziende, uffici, centri commerciali, condomini).
* Titolo di Studio: Qualifica professionale o Diploma tecnico (preferibilmente in ambito meccanico o termoidraulico).
* Certificazioni: Il possesso di un attestato di "Tecnico Manutentore Qualificato" o corsi di formazione specifici sulle normative di settore costituirà un titolo preferenziale.

Retribuzione: €1\.780,00 \- €2\.100,00 al mese

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: R&D Technical Writer
description:
**Date:** Jul 10, 2026


**Location:** Badia Polesine (RO), IT, 45021


**Company:** Dentsply Sirona, Inc


**Requistion ID**: 83763  


  

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with over a century of innovation and service to the dental industry and patients worldwide. Dentsply Sirona develops, manufactures, and markets a comprehensive solutions offering including dental and oral health products as well as other consumable medical devices under a strong portfolio of world class brands.  



Dentsply Sirona’s products provide innovative, high\-quality, and effective solutions to advance patient care and deliver better and safer dental care. Dentsply Sirona’s headquarter is located in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company’s shares are listed in the United States on NASDAQ under the symbol XRAY. Visit www.dentsplysirona.com for more information about Dentsply Sirona and its products.  



  

**For our manufacturing site in Badia Polesine (RO), we are looking for a:**  


**Technical Writer**  



In this role, you will serve as the focal point for the creation and management of technical documentation related to our medical devices. As part of the **Research \& Development** team and reporting to the **Product Development Engineer**, you will help ensure that technical information is clear, accurate, and compliant with regulatory requirements throughout the entire product lifecycle.  


**Responsibilities**
* Prepare, update, and organize technical documentation for medical devices in compliance with applicable regulations, with a particular focus on **FDA registrations and submissions**.
* Collaborate with the R\&D laboratory team to collect and formalize technical data and experimental results for the preparation of laboratory activity reports and technical documentation.
* Work closely with different company departments to support project\-related activities, with a focus on the **U.S. market** and **Private Label customer products**.
* Ensure proper traceability, control, and archiving of all technical documentation.

  


**Requirements**
* Alignment with company values of **Respect** (for company standards, vision, colleagues, customers, processes, and work instructions), **Accountability**, **Collaboration**, **Reliability**, and **Agility** (continuous improvement).
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent qualification in a scientific field (Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Chemistry and Technology, or related disciplines).
* Strong teamwork and collaboration skills.
* Good command of written and spoken English.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office and general computer applications.
* Excellent organizational skills and strong attention to detail.

  

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:** Dentsply Sirona is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will be considered without unlawful discrimination or regard for race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, sexual or gender identity, national or ethnic origin, age, marital status, disability, genetic factors, military and veteran status, or any other characteristics protected by applicable local law.
**Eligibility:** All successful applicants must be eligible to work in the country the position is based.
**Assistance:** If you need assistance with completing the online application due to a disability, please send an accommodation request to accommodationrequest@dentsplysirona.com.
**Agencies:** Please note that Dentsply Sirona does not accept or respond to unsolicited requests or applications submitted by Recruitment Agencies/ Search Firms.
**Notice on Fraudulent Job Offers:** Unfortunately, we are aware of third parties that pretend to represent our company offering unauthorized employment opportunities. If you think a fraudulent source is offering you a job, please have a look at the following information: careers.dentsplysirona.com.

title: Safety Engineer EHS / RSPP
description:
**Who We Are**

Applied Materials is a global leader in materials engineering solutions used to produce virtually every new chip and advanced display in the world. We design, build and service cutting\-edge equipment that helps our customers manufacture display and semiconductor chips – the brains of devices we use every day. As the foundation of the global electronics industry, Applied enables the exciting technologies that literally connect our world – like AI and IoT. If you want to push the boundaries of materials science and engineering to create next generation technology, join us to deliver material innovation that changes the world.


**What We Offer**

Salary:


€51\.200,00 \- €70\.400,00\&\#xa;
Location:


Treviso,ITA
You’ll benefit from a supportive work culture that encourages you to learn, develop, and grow your career as you take on challenges and drive innovative solutions for our customers. We empower our team to push the boundaries of what is possible—while learning every day in a supportive leading global company. Visit our Careers website to learn more.


At Applied Materials, we care about the health and wellbeing of our employees. We’re committed to providing programs and support that encourage personal and professional growth and care for you at work, at home, or wherever you may go. Learn more about our benefits .


**Scope of Position:**

* Safety Engineering role supporting Applied Materials’ R\&D and manufacturing operations
* Work closely with site management in R\&D and manufacturing and other EHS staff to drive Environmental, Health and Safety (EHS) programs, ensure regulatory compliance and promote continuous improvement
* Ensures compliance with required EHS codes, standards and regulations. Act as a liaison with local, regional or national regulatory authorities
* EHS Training capabilities \& experience conducting training for employees and management
* Ensures proper investigations of EHS incidents conducted and drive corrective actions to closure
* Provides management with updates and escalation on projects/programs. Maintain communication channel with site/location functions
* Interfaces with internal stakeholders regarding EHS aspects with ability to work with cross functional teams to accomplish goals and objectives
* Manage consultants/contractors used to support the EHS programs including development of scopes of work, project management and budget management. Ensures that all work is assigned appropriately and that results are obtained and evaluated
  

**Education and Experience:**

* Bachelor or master’s degree in the field of (electrical/ mechanical/electronics) Engineering or comparable education desired
* Utaly Certificate as occupational safety engineer RSPP is required
* Minimum of 5 years professional experience in an EHS function in a comparable industry (R\+D manufacturing operations)
* Knowledge of EHS legislation and implementation in Italy
* Experience with general EHS auditing to identify opportunities for improvement and provide suitable recommendations for corrective actions
* Good knowledge of MS Word, MS Excel and PowerPoint
* Readiness for occasional travelling from time to time
* Excellent Italian and English skills

**We offer:**

* An international and dynamic environment in a global company
* A challenging and varied function with a lot of personal autonomy and responsibility
* Individual induction and cooperation with industry/functional experts
* Trainings and career path
* Incentive plan based on individual performance
* Lunch Ticket
* Welfare
* Health, Injuries and Life Insurance
* ESPP (Employee Purchase Stock Plan)

**Additional Information**

**Time Type:**

Full time
**Employee Type:**

Assignee / Regular
**Travel:**

Yes, 20% of the Time
**Relocation Eligible:**

No  

  

  

The salary offered to a selected candidate will be based on multiple factors including location, hire grade, job\-related knowledge, skills, experience, and with consideration of internal equity of our current team members. In addition to a comprehensive benefits package, candidates may be eligible for other forms of compensation such as participation in a bonus and a stock award program, as applicable.

  

  

For all sales roles, the posted salary range is the Target Total Cash (TTC) range for the role, which is the sum of base salary and target bonus amount at 100% goal achievement.

  

  

Applied Materials is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, national origin, citizenship, ancestry, religion, creed, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, veteran or military status, or any other basis prohibited by law.
company_description: Applied Materials is the leader in materials engineering solutions used to produce virtually every new chip and advanced display in the world.

title: Mechanical Design Engineer
description:
Littelfuse (NASDAQ: LFUS) is a diversified industrial technology manufacturing company shaping solutions for the safe and efficient transfer of electrical energy. Headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, USA, we serve customers across industrial, transportation, and electronics markets worldwide. With approximately 16,000 employees we design and manufacture innovative technologies that support electrification, energy efficiency, and advanced automation. Our global reach is matched by a culture that empowers innovation and long\-term growth. Guided by our principles We Care, We Succeed With Our Customers, and We Own the Outcome, we work collaboratively, think boldly, and deliver solutions that move industries forward.


As a **Mechanical Design Engineer**, you will be responsible for designing and developing mechanical components and products, contributing to the entire product development process from concept to implementation. You will collaborate with cross\-functional teams to create innovative, reliable, and cost\-effective engineering solutions that meet customer requirements and industry standards.


Your work will directly support product development by improving designs, preparing technical documentation, and ensuring compliance with quality, safety, and regulatory requirements.

**About the Job:**

* Design, develop, and improve mechanical components and products based on customer and business requirements.
* Create and modify 3D models, technical drawings, and engineering documentation.
* Evaluate design concepts and recommend optimal technical solutions based on functionality, manufacturability, and performance.
* Prepare technical reports, product specifications, and design documentation.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, including manufacturing, quality, and project management, to support product development activities.
* Assist in planning project activities and coordinating engineering deliverables to meet customer expectations and project timelines.
* Support manufacturing by ensuring designs comply with internal quality standards as well as applicable safety and regulatory requirements.
* Participate in continuous improvement initiatives to enhance product performance and engineering processes.

**About You:**

* Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related engineering discipline.
* Experience in mechanical design and product development.
* Proficiency in 3D CAD modeling using SolidWorks or other comparable CAD software.
* Good understanding of mechanical engineering principles and design practices.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Ability to work effectively in a collaborative, cross\-functional team environment.
* Good communication skills and English proficiency (B1 level or higher).
* Good knowledge of Microsoft Office.

**Nice to Have:**

* Experience with thermal analysis and electromagnetic simulation tools (e.g. ANSYS or similar).
* Experience in the automotive or industrial sector.
* Knowledge of magnetic field applications.
* Familiarity with automotive quality standards (IATF) and ATEX requirements.
* Experience working in a global manufacturing environment.


Littelfuse strives to empower associate growth and development in a culture of ongoing collaboration and respect for diverse global perspectives and expertise.


Our Core Values – We Care, We Succeed With Our Customers, We Own The Outcome – support us in our mission to improve the safety, reliability, and performance of our customers’ products that use electrical energy.


We are an equal\-opportunity employer that takes pride in giving every associate the means and courage to make a difference – everywhere, every day.


\#LI\-EW1


At Littelfuse, we support employee growth and development. Guided by our culture principles, our teams work together to deliver value for customers and make a positive impact in the communities where we operate. We are an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where everyone has the opportunity to grow and contribute. We offer competitive compensation and benefits, performance\-based incentives, flexible work arrangements, and development opportunities.
company_description: Littelfuse began as a fuse manufacturer in 1927 with a singular focus on developing and manufacturing devices that protect electronics.
